meta.title: Dropper | Just drop a file, and leave the rest to us
meta.desc: Dropper is a series of small tools where you just drop a file and the work gets done. The first one auto-adds event dates to Google Calendar. Works for any sport or situation.
hero.sub: Just drop a file, and leave the rest to us
hero.catchMain:
Drop a file.
We'll take it from there.
hero.catchClose: More tools are on the way.
tools.label: Series
tools.title: The Dropper series
tool1.name: Calendar Dropper
placeholder.name: Next Dropper coming soon
policy.label: Notes
policy.title: Before you start
policy.desc: We keep prices as low as possible so anyone can give the tools a try. In return, please note the following before you buy.
policy.p1desc: Each tool is priced so you can try it without a second thought. Pick only the ones you need.
policy.p2desc: To keep prices low, we don't offer one-on-one support. Please refer to each tool's guide for how to use it.
policy.p3desc: There's no support, but tools are improved from time to time, and new information is delivered to you automatically from the tool.
about.label: About
about.title: What is Dropper
